Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************************************

 Disjoint and stable binary coproducts

 In this file, we define several properties that binary coproducts could satisfy. These are
 - Disjointness
 - Stability under pullback.
 These properties are used when defining extensive categories. An extensive category is a
 category with finite coproducts such that coproducts are disjoint and stable under pullback,
 and such that pullbacks exist of coproduct injections.

 Disjointness is easy to formulate. The requirements are that the coproduct injections are
 monomorphic and that their intersection is given by the initial object.

 However, more subtleties come up when defining stability under pullback of coproducts. The
 main challenge here lies in the requirements that you put on the category. If you require
 that all pullbacks exist, then it suffices to require that the pullback functor between
 slice categories preserves binary coproducts. In certain cases, however, one does not want
 to rely the assumption that the category has all pullbacks. In fact, to define extensiveness,
 one usually does not assume all pullbacks (see, e.g., Definition 2.1 in "Introduction to
 extensive and distributive categories" by Carboni, Lack, and Walters).

 For this reason, we define stability of binary coproducts without assuming the existence
 of all pullbacks. The full definition is given in ([stable_bincoproducts]), and basically,
 it says that whenever we have pullbacks of objects `a` and `b`, then the canonical square
 involving the binary coproduct is also a pullback. In diagrams: if we have pullbacks

<<
 ap -----> a
 |         |
 |         |
 V         V
 x ------> y
>>

 and

<<
 bp -----> b
 |         |
 |         |
 V         V
 x ------> y
>>

 then we also have a pullback

<<
 ap + bp -----> a + b
    |             |
    |             |
    V             V
    x ----------> y
>>

 where the involved maps are defined via the universal property.

 We also show that this definition of stability is equivalent to the pullback functors
 preserving binary coprduct if the involved category has pullbacks. This proof is a tedious
 verification of facts.

 Referenes
 - "Introduction to extensive and distributive categories" by Carboni, Lack, and Walters

 Contents
 1. Disjoint binary coproducts
 2. Stable binary coproducts
 3. Characterization of stable binary coproducts

 *******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.FiberCod.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodColimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. Disjoint binary coproducts *)

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
x, y: C
InitialArrow I x · BinCoproductIn1 (BC x y) =
InitialArrow I y · BinCoproductIn2 (BC x y)


C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
x, y: C
InitialArrow I x · BinCoproductIn1 (BC x y) =
InitialArrow I y · BinCoproductIn2 (BC x y)

  apply InitialArrowEq.
Qed.

Definition disjoint_bincoproducts
           {C : category}
           (BC : BinCoproducts C)
           (I : Initial C)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C),
     isMonic (BinCoproductIn1 (BC x y))
     ×
     isMonic (BinCoproductIn2 (BC x y))
     ×
     isPullback (bincoproduct_intersection BC I x y).


C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
isaprop (disjoint_bincoproducts BC I)


C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
isaprop (disjoint_bincoproducts BC I)

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
t, t0: C
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t0 : C,
    isMonic (BinCoproductIn1 (BC t t0))
    × isMonic (BinCoproductIn2 (BC t t0))
      × isPullback
          (bincoproduct_intersection BC I t t0)) t0)

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
t, t0: C
isaprop (isMonic (BinCoproductIn1 (BC t t0)))
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
t, t0: C
isaprop (isMonic (BinCoproductIn2 (BC t t0)))
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
t, t0: C
isaprop
  (isPullback (bincoproduct_intersection BC I t t0))

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
t, t0: C
isaprop (isMonic (BinCoproductIn1 (BC t t0)))
 apply isapropisMonic.
  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
t, t0: C
isaprop (isMonic (BinCoproductIn2 (BC t t0)))
 apply isapropisMonic.
  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
I: Initial C
t, t0: C
isaprop
  (isPullback (bincoproduct_intersection BC I t t0))
 apply isaprop_isPullback.
Qed.

(** * 2. Stable binary coproducts *)
Section StableBinCoproducts.
  Context {C : category}
          (BC : BinCoproducts C).

  Section Diagram.
    Context {a b x y ap bp : C}
            (f : x --> y)
            (g₁ : a --> y)
            (g₂ : b --> y)
            (π₁ : ap --> a)
            (π₂ : ap --> x)
            (ρ₁ : bp --> b)
            (ρ₂ : bp --> x).

    Let ab : BinCoproduct a b := BC a b.

    Let apbp : BinCoproduct ap bp := BC ap bp.

    Definition bincoproduct_slice_mor
      : ab --> y
      := BinCoproductArrow ab g₁ g₂.

    Definition bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor
      : apbp --> x
      := BinCoproductArrow apbp π₂ ρ₂.

    Definition pb_bincoproduct_mor
      : apbp --> ab
      := BinCoproductArrow apbp (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 ab) (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 ab).
  End Diagram.

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
pb_bincoproduct_mor π₁ ρ₁
· bincoproduct_slice_mor g₁ g₂ =
bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor π₂ ρ₂ · f

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
pb_bincoproduct_mor π₁ ρ₁
· bincoproduct_slice_mor g₁ g₂ =
bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor π₂ ρ₂ · f

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
  (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
  (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
· BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂ =
BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂ · f

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
     (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂ · f)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
     (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂ · f)

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
     (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂ · f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
· BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂ =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂ = π₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
π₁
· (BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂) = π₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
π₂ · f = π₂ · f

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
     (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂ · f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
· BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂ =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂ = ρ₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
ρ₁
· (BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC a b) g₁ g₂) = ρ₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
ρ₂ · f = ρ₂ · f

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition stable_bincoproducts
    : UU
    := ∏ (a b x y ap bp : C)
         (f : x --> y)
         (g₁ : a --> y)
         (g₂ : b --> y)
         (π₁ : ap --> a)
         (π₂ : ap --> x)
         (ρ₁ : bp --> b)
         (ρ₂ : bp --> x)
         (p : π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f)
         (q : ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f)
         (H₁ : isPullback p)
         (H₂ : isPullback q),
       isPullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag p q).

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
isaprop stable_bincoproducts

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
isaprop stable_bincoproducts

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
t, t0, t1, t2, t3, t4: C
t5: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
t6: C ⟦ t, t2 ⟧
t7: C ⟦ t0, t2 ⟧
t8: C ⟦ t3, t ⟧
t9: C ⟦ t3, t1 ⟧
t10: C ⟦ t4, t0 ⟧
t11: C ⟦ t4, t1 ⟧
t12: t8 · t6 = t9 · t5
t13: t10 · t7 = t11 · t5
t14: isPullback t12
t15: isPullback t13
isofhlevel 1
  (isPullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag t12 t13))

    apply isaprop_isPullback.
  Qed.
End StableBinCoproducts.

(** * 3. Characterization of stable binary coproducts *)
Section StableBinCoproductsCharacterization.
  Context {C : category}
          (BC : BinCoproducts C)
          (PB : Pullbacks C).

  Section ToStable.
    Context (H : ∏ (x y : C)
                   (f : x --> y),
                 preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f))
            {a b x y ap bp : C}
            (f : x --> y)
            (g₁ : a --> y)
            (g₂ : b --> y)
            (π₁ : ap --> a)
            (π₂ : ap --> x)
            (ρ₁ : bp --> b)
            (ρ₂ : bp --> x)
            (p : π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f)
            (q : ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f)
            (H₁ : isPullback p)
            (H₂ : isPullback q).

    Let ab : BinCoproduct a b := BC a b.
    Let apbp : BinCoproduct ap bp := BC ap bp.
    Let ζ : C/x := make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂).
    Let Hab : isBinCoproduct _ _ _ _ _ _ := isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct _ ab.
    Let ag₁ : C/y := make_cod_fib_ob g₁.
    Let bg₂ : C/y := make_cod_fib_ob g₂.
    Let sum : C/y := make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂).

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
C ⟦ cod_dom ag₁, cod_dom sum ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
?g · cod_mor sum = cod_mor ag₁

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
C ⟦ cod_dom ag₁, cod_dom sum ⟧
 apply BinCoproductIn1.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b) · cod_mor sum = cod_mor ag₁
 abstract
          (apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes).
    Defined.

    Let ι₁ : ag₁ --> sum := stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

PB: Pullbacks C

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
C ⟦ cod_dom bg₂, cod_dom sum ⟧
 apply BinCoproductIn2.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b) · cod_mor sum = cod_mor bg₂
 abstract
          (apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes).
    Defined.

    Let ι₂ : bg₂ --> sum := stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2.

    Let pb : Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
      := PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f.

    Let pb_sum : BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
      := make_BinCoproduct
           _ _ _ _ _ _
           (H x y f
              _ _ _ _ _
              (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂ (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct _ (BC a b)))).

    Let φa : z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
      := z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback _ H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f).

    Let φb : z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
      := z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback _ H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f).

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C / x ⟦ cod_pb PB f ag₁, ζ ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C / x ⟦ cod_pb PB f bg₂, ζ ⟧

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C / x ⟦ cod_pb PB f ag₁, ζ ⟧

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

?g0 · cod_mor ζ = cod_mor (cod_pb PB f ag₁)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C ⟦ cod_dom (cod_pb PB f ag₁), cod_dom ζ ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 _).
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· cod_mor ζ = cod_mor (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             unfold bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             rewrite BinCoproductIn1Commutes ;
             apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback p H₁))).

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C / x ⟦ cod_pb PB f bg₂, ζ ⟧

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
C ⟦ cod_dom (cod_pb PB f bg₂), cod_dom ζ ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 _).
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· cod_mor ζ = cod_mor (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             unfold bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             rewrite BinCoproductIn2Commutes ;
             apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback q H₂))).
    Defined.

    Let hp : pb_sum --> ζ
      := stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help.

    Definition stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
      : pb --> BC ap bp
      := dom_mor stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
C ⟦ BC ap bp, pb ⟧

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

 exact (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)).

C ⟦ bp, pb ⟧
 exact (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)).
    Defined.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
· cod_mor pb_sum = cod_mor ζ

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
· cod_mor pb_sum = cod_mor ζ

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) = bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
  (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
  (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) = bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C

H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
  (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
  (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) = BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
φa
· (dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) = π₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)

   · PullbackPr2

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

· (dom_mor (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f ι₁)
   · PullbackPr2

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)
     (PB y a x g₁ f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
     (PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁ sum
        ι₁)
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f) · PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f) = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
PullbackArrow (PB y a x g₁ f) (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p H₁))
  (PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback p H₁))
  (PullbackSqrCommutes (make_Pullback p H₁))
· PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f) = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback p H₁) = π₂

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
φb
· (dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) = ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
φb
· (dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

          apply idpath.

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
φb
· (dom_mor (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f ι₂)
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)
     (PB y b x g₂ f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
      · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
     (PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂ sum
        ι₂)
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)) = ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f) · PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f) = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
PullbackArrow (PB y b x g₂ f) (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback q H₂))
  (PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback q H₂))
  (PullbackSqrCommutes (make_Pullback q H₂))
· PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f) = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback q H₂) = ρ₂

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
