  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
?g · cod_mor pb_sum = cod_mor ζ

BC: BinCoproducts C

preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

C ⟦ cod_dom ζ, cod_dom pb_sum ⟧
 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
· cod_mor pb_sum = cod_mor ζ
 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_eq.
    Defined.

    Let hp_inv : ζ --> pb_sum
      := stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
  (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)))

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
identity pb
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
  (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
  (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor =
identity (BC ap bp)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
identity pb
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
dom_mor (hp · hp_inv)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · (hp · hp_inv) =
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · (hp · hp_inv) =
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
dom_mor (hp · hp_inv)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
dom_mor hp · dom_mor hp_inv

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · (hp · hp_inv) =
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · hp · hp_inv =
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum
· BinCoproductArrow pb_sum
    (make_cod_fib_mor
       (inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp))
       stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof)
    (make_cod_fib_mor
       (inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp))
       stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof0)
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice =
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
make_cod_fib_mor
  (inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp))
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice =
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp))
     stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof
   · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp))
     stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof)
· dom_mor
    stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φa
· (BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
       (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
       (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φa
· (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φa · φa
· dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
identity (PB y a x g₁ f)
· dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum =
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

          exact (!(id_right _)).
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · (hp · hp_inv) =
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · hp · hp_inv =
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum
· BinCoproductArrow pb_sum
    (make_cod_fib_mor
       (inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp))
       stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof)
    (make_cod_fib_mor
       (inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp))
       stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof0)
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice =
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
make_cod_fib_mor
  (inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp))
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof0
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice =
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp))
     stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof0
   · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φb
· (BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
   · BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
       (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
       (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φb
· (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso φb · φb
· dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
identity (PB y b x g₂ f)
· dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum =
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum · identity pb_sum

          exact (!(id_right _)).
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
  (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
  (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor =
identity (BC ap bp)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
   · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
   · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
   · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

?b = BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)
· dom_mor
    stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help =
?t2

            
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?t2 =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)
· dom_mor
    stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help

            exact (comp_in_cod_fib
                     (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum)
                     stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help).
          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φa
· dom_mor
    (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum
     · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

· dom_mor
    (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum
     · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help) =
?b

BC: BinCoproducts C

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?b = BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

BC: BinCoproducts C

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φa
· dom_mor
    (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum
     · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help) =
?b

            
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
