  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help = 
?t2

            apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φa
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor
       (inv_from_z_iso φa · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp))
       stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· (from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y a x g₁ f)
     (make_Pullback p H₁) · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· (from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y a x g₁ f)
     (make_Pullback p H₁) · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y a x g₁ f)
    (make_Pullback p H₁) · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y a x g₁ f)
    (make_Pullback p H₁) · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) =
?b
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?b = BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)

?b

            
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y a x g₁ f)
    (make_Pullback p H₁) = ?y'

            exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso φa).
          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
identity ap · BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)

          apply id_left.
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
     (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
     (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
   · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

BC: BinCoproducts C

H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?t2 =
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)
· dom_mor
    stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help

            exact (comp_in_cod_fib
                     (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum)
                     stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help).
          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φb
· dom_mor
    (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum
     · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φb
· dom_mor
    (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum
     · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help) =
?b

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?b = BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

· dom_mor
    (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum
     · stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help) =
?b

            
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help = 
?t2

            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φb
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor
       (inv_from_z_iso φb · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp))
       stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help_subproof0) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· (from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y b x g₂ f)
     (make_Pullback q H₂) · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) · identity (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· (from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y b x g₂ f)
     (make_Pullback q H₂) · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y b x g₂ f)
    (make_Pullback q H₂) · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)

PB: Pullbacks C

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y b x g₂ f)
    (make_Pullback q H₂) · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) =
?b

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?b = BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· from_Pullback_to_Pullback (PB y b x g₂ f)
    (make_Pullback q H₂) = ?y'

            exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso φb).
          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
identity bp · BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)

          apply id_left.
    Qed.

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
z_iso pb (BC ap bp)

PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
C ⟦ pb, BC ap bp ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
C ⟦ BC ap bp, pb ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
C ⟦ pb, BC ap bp ⟧
 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor.

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
C ⟦ BC ap bp, pb ⟧
 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inverses.
    Defined.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁ = PullbackPr1 pb

BC: BinCoproducts C

H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁ = PullbackPr1 pb

pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
PullbackPr1 pb =
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_z_iso
· PullbackPr1 pb = pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

· PullbackPr1 pb = pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
   · PullbackPr1 pb) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C

· (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
   · PullbackPr1 pb) =

· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

· (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
   · PullbackPr1 pb) =

· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧

· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
· PullbackPr1 pb =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr1 pb =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr1 pb =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) · PullbackPr1 pb =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q

ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂

        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧

dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) · PullbackPr1 pb =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f

PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂

           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)

  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
φa · dom_mor (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f ι₁)
· PullbackPr1 pb = π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) (PB y a x g₁ f)
    (PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
     · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f))
    (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁ sum ι₁)
· PullbackPr1 pb = π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)
     (PB y a x g₁ f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
     (PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁ sum
        ι₁) · PullbackPr1 pb) =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· (PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)) =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f) · PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b) =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
PullbackArrow (PB y a x g₁ f) (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p H₁))
  (PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback p H₁))
  (PullbackSqrCommutes (make_Pullback p H₁))
· PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b) =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p H₁)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b) =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
   · PullbackPr1 pb) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
· PullbackPr1 pb =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr1 pb =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr1 pb =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) · PullbackPr1 pb =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

BC: BinCoproducts C

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
