  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) · PullbackPr1 pb =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

          apply idpath.

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
φb · dom_mor (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f ι₂)
· PullbackPr1 pb = ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) (PB y b x g₂ f)
    (PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
     · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
    (PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f))
    (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂ sum ι₂)
· PullbackPr1 pb = ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)
     (PB y b x g₂ f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
      · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
     (PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂ sum
        ι₂) · PullbackPr1 pb) =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C

from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· (PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)) =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b

ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f) · PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b) =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
PullbackArrow (PB y b x g₂ f) (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback q H₂))
  (PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback q H₂))
  (PullbackSqrCommutes (make_Pullback q H₂))
· PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b) =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback q H₂)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b) =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂ = PullbackPr2 pb

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂ = PullbackPr2 pb

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
PullbackPr2 pb =
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C

H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

· PullbackPr2 pb = bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧

· (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
   · PullbackPr2 pb) =

· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧

· (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
   · PullbackPr2 pb) =

· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr2 pb =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr2 pb =
BinCoproductIn1 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) · PullbackPr2 pb =
π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C

a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) · PullbackPr2 pb =
π₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)

          apply idpath.

  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
φa · dom_mor (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f ι₁)
· PullbackPr2 pb = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) (PB y a x g₁ f)
    (PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
     · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f))
    (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁ sum ι₁)
· PullbackPr2 pb = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f)
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)
     (PB y a x g₁ f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PB y a x g₁ f)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
     (PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁ sum
        ι₁) · PullbackPr2 pb) = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PB y a x g₁ f) · PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f) = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
PullbackArrow (PB y a x g₁ f) (make_Pullback p H₁)
  (PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p H₁))
  (PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback p H₁))
  (PullbackSqrCommutes (make_Pullback p H₁))
· PullbackPr2 (PB y a x g₁ f) = π₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback p H₁) = π₂

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
   · PullbackPr2 pb) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q

ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv
· PullbackPr2 pb =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr2 pb =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (φa · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn1 pb_sum))
    (φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum))
· PullbackPr2 pb =
BinCoproductIn2 (BC ap bp)
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) · PullbackPr2 pb =
ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x)

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧

dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
φb · dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) · PullbackPr2 pb =
ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)

          apply idpath.

  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
φb · dom_mor (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f ι₂)
· PullbackPr2 pb = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
       f) (PB y b x g₂ f)
    (PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
     · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
    (PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f))
    (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂ sum ι₂)
· PullbackPr2 pb = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f)
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f)
     (PB y b x g₂ f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PB y b x g₂ f)
      · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))
     (PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂ sum
        ι₂) · PullbackPr2 pb) = ρ₂

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y

  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
from_Pullback_to_Pullback (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PB y b x g₂ f) · PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f) = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
PullbackArrow (PB y b x g₂ f) (make_Pullback q H₂)
  (PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback q H₂))
  (PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback q H₂))
  (PullbackSqrCommutes (make_Pullback q H₂))
· PullbackPr2 (PB y b x g₂ f) = ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
r: dom_mor (BinCoproductIn2 pb_sum) =
dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback q H₂) = ρ₂

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)

  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
isPullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧

  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
z_iso pb (BC ap bp)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?i · pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁ = PullbackPr1 pb

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

H₂: isPullback q

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)

bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y

ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂

hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
?i · bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂ =
PullbackPr2 pb

 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_z_iso.

p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f

  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x

· pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁ = PullbackPr1 pb
 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_left.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ap, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
ζ:= make_cod_fib_ob
  (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂): C / x
Hab:= isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C ab: isBinCoproduct C a b ab (BinCoproductIn1 ab)
  (BinCoproductIn2 ab)
ag₁:= make_cod_fib_ob g₁: C / y
bg₂:= make_cod_fib_ob g₂: C / y
sum:= make_cod_fib_ob (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂): C / y
ι₁:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in1: C / y ⟦ ag₁, sum ⟧
ι₂:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_in2: C / y ⟦ bg₂, sum ⟧
pb:= PB y (BC a b) x (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂)
  f: Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
pb_sum:= make_BinCoproduct (C / x) 
  (cod_pb PB f ag₁) (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f sum) (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₁)
  (# (cod_pb PB f) ι₂)
  (H x y f ag₁ bg₂ sum ι₁ ι₂
     (to_bincoproduct_slice ι₁ ι₂
        (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct C
           (BC a b)))): BinCoproduct (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
φa:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback p H₁) (PB y a x g₁ f): z_iso ap (PB y a x g₁ f)
φb:= z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback
  (make_Pullback q H₂) (PB y b x g₂ f): z_iso bp (PB y b x g₂ f)
hp:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_mor_help: C / x ⟦ pb_sum, ζ ⟧
hp_inv:= stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_inv_slice: C / x ⟦ ζ, pb_sum ⟧
stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_z_iso
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂ = PullbackPr2 pb
 exact stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct_right.
    Defined.
  End ToStable.

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
stable_bincoproducts BC

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
stable_bincoproducts BC

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
a, b, x, y, ab, bp: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ ab, a ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ ab, x ⟧
ρ₁: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
H₁: isPullback p
H₂: isPullback q
isPullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)

    exact (stable_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct H _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ H₁ H₂).
  Defined.

  Section FromStable.
    Context (H : stable_bincoproducts BC)
            {x y : C}
            (f : x --> y)
            (ag₁ bg₂ : C / y).

    Let a : C := cod_dom ag₁.
    Let g₁ : a --> y := cod_mor ag₁.

    Let b : C := cod_dom bg₂.
    Let g₂ : b --> y := cod_mor bg₂.

    Let ap : Pullback g₁ f := PB _ _ _ g₁ f.
    Let π₁ : ap --> a := PullbackPr1 ap.
    Let π₂ : ap --> x := PullbackPr2 ap.

    Let bp : Pullback g₂ f := PB _ _ _ g₂ f.
    Let ρ₁ : bp --> b := PullbackPr1 bp.
    Let ρ₂ : bp --> x := PullbackPr2 bp.

    Let p : π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f := PullbackSqrCommutes ap.
    Let q : ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f := PullbackSqrCommutes bp.

    Let Hap : isPullback p := isPullback_Pullback ap.
    Let Hbp : isPullback q := isPullback_Pullback bp.

    Let Hpb : Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
      := make_Pullback _ (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap Hbp).

    Let ab : BinCoproduct a b := BC a b.

    Let apbp : BinCoproduct ap bp := BC ap bp.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp,
PB y (BC a b) x
  (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f ⟧

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp,
PB y (BC a b) x
  (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f ⟧

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp, BC a b ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp, x ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
?h · cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b) =
?k · f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp, BC a b ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr1 Hpb).
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp, x ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr2 Hpb).
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 Hpb
· cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b) =
PullbackPr2 Hpb · f
 abstract
          (apply (PullbackSqrCommutes Hpb)).
    Defined.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C
⟦ PB y (BC a b) x
    (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f,
apbp ⟧

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C

b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C
⟦ PB y (BC a b) x
    (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f,
BC a b ⟧
 apply PullbackPr1.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C
⟦ PB y (BC a b) x
    (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f, x ⟧
 apply PullbackPr2.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂ =
PullbackPr2
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· f
 abstract
          (apply PullbackSqrCommutes).
    Defined.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
is_inverse_in_precat from_stable_mor from_stable_inv

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
is_inverse_in_precat from_stable_mor from_stable_inv

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
is_inverse_in_precat
  (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
     from_stable_mor_subproof)
  (PullbackArrow Hpb
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     (PullbackPr1
        (PB y (BC a b) x
           (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
           f))
     (PullbackPr2
        (PB y (BC a b) x
           (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
           f)) from_stable_inv_subproof)

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
  from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackArrow Hpb
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
          f))
    (PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
          f)) from_stable_inv_subproof = identity apbp
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow Hpb
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) 
    (PullbackPr2 Hpb) from_stable_mor_subproof =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

BC: BinCoproducts C

H: stable_bincoproducts BC

ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
