  from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackArrow Hpb
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))

          f)) from_stable_inv_subproof = identity apbp
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
  from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackArrow Hpb
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
          f))
    (PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
          f)) from_stable_inv_subproof
· PullbackPr1 Hpb = identity apbp · PullbackPr1 Hpb

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
  from_stable_mor_subproof
· (PullbackArrow Hpb
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     (PullbackPr1
        (PB y (BC a b) x
           (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
           f))
     (PullbackPr2
        (PB y (BC a b) x
           (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
           f)) from_stable_inv_subproof
   · PullbackPr1 Hpb) =
identity apbp · PullbackPr1 Hpb

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q

  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
  from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
identity apbp · PullbackPr1 Hpb

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 Hpb = identity apbp · PullbackPr1 Hpb

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 Hpb = PullbackPr1 Hpb

          apply idpath.

BC: BinCoproducts C

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y

ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)

· PullbackArrow Hpb
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))

PB: Pullbacks C

ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧

q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
  from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
identity apbp · PullbackPr2 Hpb

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 Hpb = identity apbp · PullbackPr2 Hpb

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 Hpb = PullbackPr2 Hpb

          apply idpath.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow Hpb
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
    from_stable_mor_subproof =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow Hpb
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow Hpb
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
     from_stable_mor_subproof
   · PullbackPr1
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
          f)) =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow Hpb
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof · PullbackPr1 Hpb =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q

  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

a:= cod_dom ag₁: C

b:= cod_dom bg₂: C

p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
PullbackPr1
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C

b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧

bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p

  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f

apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp

  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow Hpb
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     apbp (PullbackPr1 Hpb) (PullbackPr2 Hpb)
     from_stable_mor_subproof
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC a b) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b))
          f)) =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow Hpb
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f))
  from_stable_inv_subproof · PullbackPr2 Hpb =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
identity
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

          
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f) =
PullbackPr2
  (PB y (BC a b) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp · from_stable_mor

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp · from_stable_mor

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in1 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in1 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in1 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in1 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in1 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
     (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
     from_stable_mor_subproof
   · PullbackPr1
       (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
             (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp · pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) =
π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b)

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in1 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f ag₁
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in1 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
     (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
     from_stable_mor_subproof
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
             (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 ag₁) x (pr2 ag₁) f) = π₂

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp · from_stable_mor

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp · from_stable_mor

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in2 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in2 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in2 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in2 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in2 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr1
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
     (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
     from_stable_mor_subproof
   · PullbackPr1
       (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
             (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp · pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp)
    (π₁ · BinCoproductIn1 (BC a b))
    (ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) =
ρ₁ · BinCoproductIn2 (BC a b)

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in2 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· PullbackArrow
    (PB y (BC a b) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
    apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
    (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
    from_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackArrow
  (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f)
  (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
  (PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PB x y f bg₂
     (cod_fib_coproduct_ob ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)))
     (cod_fib_coproduct_in2 ag₁ bg₂
        (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))))
· PullbackPr2
    (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
       (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
          (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· (PullbackArrow
     (PB y (BC a b) x
        (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂ (BC a b)) f)
     apbp (pb_bincoproduct_mor BC π₁ ρ₁)
     (bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂)
     from_stable_mor_subproof
   · PullbackPr2
       (PB y (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂)) x
          (cod_fib_coproduct_ob_mor ag₁ bg₂
             (BC (cod_dom ag₁) (cod_dom bg₂))) f))

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· bincoproduct_pb_slice_mor BC π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· BinCoproductArrow (BC ap bp) π₂ ρ₂

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
PullbackPr2 (PB y (pr1 bg₂) x (pr2 bg₂) f) = ρ₂

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
isBinCoproduct (C / x) (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))
  (# (cod_pb PB f)
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))
  (# (cod_pb PB f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))

BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f

π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f

  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
