  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))
  (# (cod_pb PB f)
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))
  (# (cod_pb PB f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
isBinCoproduct C (cod_dom (cod_pb PB f ag₁))
  (cod_dom (cod_pb PB f bg₂))
  (cod_dom
     (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))
  (dom_mor
     (# (cod_pb PB f)
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))))
  (dom_mor
     (# (cod_pb PB f)
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))))

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
isBinCoproduct C (cod_dom (cod_pb PB f ag₁))
  (cod_dom (cod_pb PB f bg₂))
  (cod_dom
     (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))
  (dom_mor
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))))
  (dom_mor
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))))

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
z_iso apbp
  (cod_dom
     (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp · ?f
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp · ?f

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
z_iso apbp
  (cod_dom
     (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))
 
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp,
cod_dom
  (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)) ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C
⟦ cod_dom
    (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)),
apbp ⟧
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C ⟦ apbp,
cod_dom
  (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)) ⟧
 exact from_stable_mor.
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
C
⟦ cod_dom
    (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)),
apbp ⟧
 exact from_stable_inv.
        
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
is_inverse_in_precat from_stable_mor from_stable_inv
 exact from_stable_inverses.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn1 apbp
· make_z_iso from_stable_mor from_stable_inv
    from_stable_inverses
 exact from_stable_in1.
      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
a:= cod_dom ag₁: C
g₁:= cod_mor ag₁: C ⟦ a, y ⟧
b:= cod_dom bg₂: C
g₂:= cod_mor bg₂: C ⟦ b, y ⟧
ap:= PB y a x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 ap: C ⟦ ap, a ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 ap: C ⟦ ap, x ⟧
bp:= PB y b x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 bp: C ⟦ bp, b ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 bp: C ⟦ bp, x ⟧
p:= PullbackSqrCommutes ap: π₁ · g₁ = π₂ · f
q:= PullbackSqrCommutes bp: ρ₁ · g₂ = ρ₂ · f
Hap:= isPullback_Pullback ap: isPullback p
Hbp:= isPullback_Pullback bp: isPullback q
Hpb:= make_Pullback (bincoproduct_pb_diag BC p q)
  (H a b x y ap bp f g₁ g₂ π₁ π₂ ρ₁ ρ₂ p q Hap
     Hbp): Pullback (bincoproduct_slice_mor BC g₁ g₂) f
ab:= BC a b: BinCoproduct a b
apbp:= BC ap bp: BinCoproduct ap bp
dom_mor
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))) =
BinCoproductIn2 apbp
· make_z_iso from_stable_mor from_stable_inv
    from_stable_inverses
 exact from_stable_in2.
    Defined.
  End FromStable.

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinCoproducts (C / y)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_chosen_bincoproduct ?HC₁ (cod_pb PB f)

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinCoproducts (C / y)

      
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinCoproducts C

      exact BC.
    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_chosen_bincoproduct
  (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC) (cod_pb PB f)

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
isBinCoproduct (C / x) (cod_pb PB f ag₁)
  (cod_pb PB f bg₂)
  (cod_pb PB f (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂))
  (# (cod_pb PB f)
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))
  (# (cod_pb PB f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (bincoproducts_cod_fib y BC ag₁ bg₂)))

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
H: stable_bincoproducts BC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ag₁, bg₂: C / y
stable_bincoproducts BC

    exact H.
  Defined.

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
stable_bincoproducts BC
≃ (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f))

  
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
stable_bincoproducts BC
≃ (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f))

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
stable_bincoproducts BC
→ ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
(∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f))
→ stable_bincoproducts BC
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
isaprop (stable_bincoproducts BC)
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f))

    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
stable_bincoproducts BC
→ ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f)
 exact @pb_preserves_bincoproduct_from_stable_bincoproducts.
    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
(∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f))
→ stable_bincoproducts BC
 exact stable_bincoproducts_from_pb_preserves_bincoproduct.
    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
isaprop (stable_bincoproducts BC)
 abstract
        (apply isaprop_stable_bincoproducts).
    
C: category
BC: BinCoproducts C
PB: Pullbacks C
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_bincoproduct (cod_pb PB f))
 abstract
        (do 3 (use impred ; intro) ;
         apply isaprop_preserves_bincoproduct).
  Defined.
End StableBinCoproductsCharacterization.
